# cf-ai-site-starter

This repository is an AI-friendly Cloudflare full-stack starter.

## Modules

- `app/frontend`: Vite TypeScript frontend for Cloudflare Pages.
- `app/worker`: Cloudflare Workers API.
- `migrations`: D1 SQL migrations.
- `.github/workflows`: CI, preview, and production deployment.
- `docs/runbooks`: operational procedures.

## Common Commands

```bash
npm install
npm run typecheck
npm test
npm run build
npm run dev
npm run cf:migrate:local
```

## Operating Boundary

Agents may propose and test changes locally. Production Cloudflare mutations, remote migrations, DNS changes, and credential rotation need explicit human approval.
